channel.title: learning-paths on Andrea Dainese
channel.description: Recent content in learning-paths on Andrea Dainese

item.title: Nautobot automation series
item.description: Welcome to our Patreon-exclusive series on Nautobot Automations! If you’re an IT professional, network engineer, or automation enthusiast, this is your gateway to mastering network automation using Nautobot. Nautobot is an open-source Network Source of Truth and Network Automation Platform.
